nodes.label: EloChess
nodes.description: Chess training application targeting Android, iOS, and Web via Capacitor

nodes.label: CLAUDE.md
nodes.description: Claude Code agent instructions for the EloChess project: stack, structure, conventions, known bugs

nodes.label: chess-agent.md
nodes.description: Chess knowledge base reference: piece values, openings, tactics, mates, endgames, SM-2, Stockfish UCI, Chess.com API, ELO ratings, terminology

nodes.label: README.md
nodes.description: Default Vite + React template README covering HMR plugins and ESLint config guidance

nodes.label: index.html
nodes.description: App HTML shell; mounts #root and loads /src/main.jsx as module entry; PWA meta tags and manifest link

nodes.label: Vite
nodes.description: Build tool for the project

nodes.label: React
nodes.description: UI library; functional components + hooks only, no class components

nodes.label: Tailwind CSS v3
nodes.description: Styling framework; only pre-defined utility classes, no JIT arbitrary values unless necessary

nodes.label: chess.js
nodes.description: Chess logic library used for move validation and game state

nodes.label: react-chessboard
nodes.description: Board rendering component library

nodes.label: Zustand
nodes.description: State management library; store lives in src/store/, used for cross-page state

nodes.label: SM-2 algorithm
nodes.description: Custom spaced repetition implementation used in SpacedReviewPage

nodes.label: Pollinations.ai
nodes.description: AI coaching service; chess-only, no off-topic responses, used in VsCoachPage

nodes.label: Stockfish
nodes.description: Chess engine used for analysis via UCI protocol

nodes.label: Chess.com public API
nodes.description: External API for importing user games (PGN, archives endpoints)

nodes.label: Capacitor
nodes.description: Mobile wrapper framework for Android/iOS, configured via capacitor.config.json

nodes.label: Stale Closure Bug (RESOLVED)
nodes.description: Chess instances and move indices must use useRef not useState to avoid stale closures in useCallback; only FEN strings use useState

nodes.label: SM-2 nextInterval formula
nodes.description: Pseudocode for computing next review interval from quality q, easiness factor EF, and repetition count n

nodes.label: Stockfish UCI Commands
nodes.description: uci, isready, position fen, go depth, go movetime, stop, quit

nodes.label: Piece Values (Centipawns)
nodes.description: Pawn 100, Knight 320, Bishop 330, Rook 500, Queen 900, King infinite

nodes.label: ELO Rating System
nodes.description: Rating bands from Beginner (<800) to International Master/Grandmaster (2500+) with associated skill suggestions

nodes.label: Opening Theory
nodes.description: e4 (open games), d4 (closed games), and flank openings with named variations (Italian Game, Ruy López, Sicilian, French, Caro-Kann, Queen's Gambit, KID, Nimzo-Indian, Grünfeld, English, Réti, etc.)

nodes.label: Tactical Patterns
nodes.description: Fork, Pin, Skewer, Discovered Attack, Double Check, Zwischenzug, Deflection, Decoy, Overloading, X-Ray

nodes.label: Checkmate Patterns
nodes.description: Back Rank, Smothered, Scholar's, Fool's, Epaulette, Anastasia's, Arabian, Opera, Boden's, Hook, Dovetail mates

nodes.label: Endgame Technique
nodes.description: King activation, passed pawns, rooks behind passed pawns, opposition, zugzwang, and essential endgame table (K+Q vs K, K+R vs K, Lucena, Philidor, etc.)

nodes.label: Common Chess Terms
nodes.description: Blunder, Mistake, Inaccuracy, Tempo, Initiative, Compensation, Fianchetto, En passant, Promotion, Castling — used for UI labels/tooltips

nodes.label: src/
nodes.description: Main source directory containing assets, components, core, data, hooks, pages, store, styles, utils

nodes.label: src/pages/
nodes.description: One file per route/screen, named *Page.jsx

nodes.label: src/store/
nodes.description: Zustand store slices for cross-page state

nodes.label: src/core/
nodes.description: Core chess logic: engine wrappers, SM-2, etc.

nodes.label: src/hooks/
nodes.description: Custom React hooks, prefixed with use

nodes.label: src/data/
nodes.description: Static data: openings, puzzles, trap definitions

nodes.label: src/assets/
nodes.description: Images and icons

nodes.label: capacitor.config.json
nodes.description: Capacitor configuration; should not be modified without checking iOS/Android targets

nodes.label: src/main.jsx
nodes.description: App entry point, loaded as module script from index.html

nodes.label: src/App.jsx
nodes.description: Root component + routing

nodes.label: OpeningsPage.jsx
nodes.description: Browse and study chess openings

nodes.label: LearnOpeningsPage.jsx
nodes.description: Interactive opening learning

nodes.label: OpeningQuizPage.jsx
nodes.description: Quiz on learned openings

nodes.label: SpacedReviewPage.jsx
nodes.description: SM-2 spaced repetition review session

nodes.label: PuzzlesPage.jsx
nodes.description: Tactical puzzles

nodes.label: MatePatternPage.jsx
nodes.description: Checkmate pattern drills

nodes.label: MemoryDrillPage.jsx
nodes.description: Memory-based position drills

nodes.label: EndgamesPage.jsx
nodes.description: Endgame technique practice

nodes.label: VsCoachPage.jsx
nodes.description: Play against AI coach (Pollinations.ai)

nodes.label: FreePlayPage.jsx
nodes.description: Free play board

nodes.label: ImportGamesPage.jsx
nodes.description: Import games via Chess.com API

nodes.label: GameReviewPage.jsx
nodes.description: Review imported games with Stockfish

nodes.label: ProgressPage.jsx
nodes.description: User stats and progress tracking

nodes.label: EloRoadmapPage.jsx
nodes.description: ELO improvement roadmap

nodes.label: FavouritesPage.jsx
nodes.description: Saved positions/openings

nodes.label: PieceValuesPage.jsx
nodes.description: Educational piece value reference

nodes.label: RateDifficultyPage.jsx
nodes.description: Rate puzzle/drill difficulty

nodes.label: SettingsPage.jsx
nodes.description: App settings

nodes.label: public/favicon.svg
nodes.description: App favicon — purple/blue isometric cube-like logo graphic matching hero.png

nodes.label: public/icons.svg
nodes.description: SVG sprite sheet defining social/UI icon symbols: bluesky, discord, documentation, github, social, x

nodes.label: src/assets/react.svg
nodes.description: React logo asset

nodes.label: src/assets/vite.svg
nodes.description: Vite logo asset

nodes.label: hero.png
nodes.description: Hero graphic: two stacked isometric rounded-square 'tiles' — an outlined white/transparent tile floating above a solid purple gradient tile with a marbled texture on its edge, matching the app's purple brand colour and cube-like favicon motif
